abstract.t:
This document describes the scenarios, requirements and technologies for IPv6-based Cloud-oriented Networking.
Discussion Venues
This note is to be removed before publishing as an RFC.
Discussion of this document takes place on the Computing-Aware Traffic Steering Working Group mailing list (cats@ietf.org), which is archived at https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/browse/cats/.
Source for this draft and an issue tracker can be found at https://github.com/VMatrix1900/draft-cats-ipv6-based-con.
